channel.title: INfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cheesy Jalapeño Cashew Dressing
item.description: Move over, Ranch, there’s a new creamy dressing in town that’s stealing our hearts! This cheesy jalapeño cashew dressing is our new go-to for salads, ...

item.title: PF Chang’s Honey Chicken (Copycat)
item.description: If you love PF Chang’s honey chicken, you’re going to love this! I figured out how to make it at…

item.title: Copycat Olive Garden Menu Plan
item.description: I had the best idea: make all your Copycat Olive Garden Menu favorites at home for a fun “night out”…

item.title: Creamy Sausage Spaghetti
item.description: If you love a creamy pasta with big flavor, this creamy sausage spaghetti needs to be on your menu. Smoked…

item.title: Tuscan Melting Cabbage
item.description: Groceries are expensive right now, so I’ve been leaning hard on the cheap staples. This melting cabbage with a garlicky…

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #79
item.description: I planned dinner, so you don’t have to! This weekly meal plan includes easy dinners plus a free shopping list!…

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)
item.description: While recently making our tahini cookies for what felt like the millionth time, we thought, Why not add chocolate to this party? The result was even b...

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...
